cnbc.title: Oil retreats even after Energy Secretary wrongly claims Navy escorted tanker through Strait of Hormuz
cnbc.summary: The International Energy Agency will hold an extraordinary meeting on Tuesday to discuss a possible release of emergency stockpiles.

cnbc.title: Tillis maintains blockade on Fed pick Kevin Warsh over Powell probe
cnbc.summary: Sen. Thom Tillis met with Federal Reserve chairman nominee Kevin Warsh, who President Donald Trump wants to replace Chair Jerome Powell.

cnbc.title: Oracle stock jumps 9% on earnings beat and increased guidance as cloud revenue climbs 44%
cnbc.summary: Oracle boosted its revenue backlog total by $30 billion during the February quarter.

cnbc.title: Microsoft backs Anthropic in Pentagon blacklist battle, urges temporary restraining order
cnbc.summary: Microsoft threw its support behind Anthropic and advocated for a temporary restraining order to the Pentagon's supply chain risk designation.

cnbc.title: Kevin Warsh faces an economic 'perfect storm' as he waits to take over as Fed chair
cnbc.summary: Warsh faces a potential buzzsaw in the form of a Hobson's choice between fighting inflation and supporting the labor market.

cnbc.title: Gas prices threaten Republican lawmaker's plans to win on affordability
cnbc.summary: House Republicans plan to keep control of that chamber on a message of low costs. But higher oil prices could complicate that message.

cnbc.title: Lego keeps beating the toy industry. Its secret weapon is not what you'd expect
cnbc.summary: Lego on Tuesday reported a 12% jump in revenue for fiscal year 2025 and reported consumer sales that far outpace the broader toy industry.

cnbc.title: Amazon wins court order to block Perplexity's AI shopping agent
cnbc.summary: Amazon sued Perplexity in November, accusing the startup of concealing its AI shopping agents.

cnbc.title: Ford launches new AI to grow multibillion-dollar Pro commercial business
cnbc.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley last month said diversifying Pro's revenue — specifically in software — is a crucial growth area for the company.

cnbc.title: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war, Witkoff says
cnbc.summary: U.S. officials have said Russia has given Iran information that could help its forces strike U.S. military assets in the Middle East, MS Now has reported.
